description: Adar library registry — community libraries for the Adar styling language

adar-ui-core.description: Essential utility classes for Adar — spacing, colors, typography, layout, and responsive utilities
adar-ui-core.author: Adar

adar-ui-fancy.description: A beautiful component library for Adar — stylish buttons, cards, badges, and alerts
adar-ui-fancy.author: Adar

adar-ui-pro.description: Professional-grade components for Adar — advanced buttons, chips, dialogs, and elevation systems
adar-ui-pro.author: Adar
